name: Household settings & archive rules
description: Implement household settings update and archive. Backend: PATCH /api/v1/households/:id (admin-only; update name, default currency, timezone, default visibility preference) and POST /api/v1/households/:id/archive (admin-only; blocks archive if other active members exist, requires explicit confirmation flag). Frontend: Household Settings page with form for metadata fields and a danger-zone Archive section with confirmation dialog. Per docs/product-specs/household-management.md. Does NOT include member management or deletion (delete is post-MVP).
